title: Tiruchirappalli、Tamil Nadu — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Tiruchirappalli、Tamil Nadu的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Tiruchirappalli是Tamil Nadu的一個城市，人口約1,000,000。A historic city in Tamil Nadu, known for the Rockfort Temple, Srirangam temple complex, and its central location in the state.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
